instructions.text: Tap the tasks that need notes
instructions.audio: Which of these tasks need notes? Tap all that apply.

scenarios.explanation: Yes! Hard to remember 12 items without a list
No notes needed - you do this every day!
Yes! Write down what to do and when it's due

scenarios.text: Learning how to fix a bike tire
scenarios.explanation: Yes! Steps are easy to forget without notes
No notes needed - you already know how!

perfect.message: Perfect! You know when notes help! 🎯
perfect.audio: Great job! You understand when to take notes.

tryAgain.message: Look again. Which tasks are new or have many steps? 💡
tryAgain.audio: Think about which tasks are easy to forget.
